title: Debris from aerial interception strikes Oracle building in Dubai, UAE says
summary_full: The damage to Oracle's building comes after Iran warned it would target U.S. tech companies operating in the Middle East.
summary_public: The damage to Oracle's building comes after Iran warned it would target U.S. tech companies operating in the Middle East.
